speaker: seller

args.message: Great question. Honestly, 142,000 miles on a Tahoe with the 5.3L V8 is nothing—these engines are built to go 200,000+ with proper care, and this one's been dealer-maintained the whole way. We just had the transmission serviced, fluids are all topped off, and it runs strong. No red flags coming up. You're looking at normal maintenance—oil changes, filters, that kind of thing—but nothing major to worry about. These trucks are workhorses.
